CheckTitle: 检查RDS Parameter Group events are subscribed.
Description: 确保Amazon RDS event notification subscriptions已启用 for 数据库 parameter groups events.
Risk: Amazon RDS 事件订阅s for 数据库 parameter groups are designed to provide incident notification of events that may affect the security, availability, and reliability of the RDS 数据库 instances associated with these parameter groups.

Recommendation.Text: To subscribe to RDS 实例 event notifications, see Subscribing to Amazon RDS event notification in the Amazon RDS User Guide.
